reviews.review_description:
SHOOT THE ROBOTS VR IS WAYYY FUNNN !! IF YOU LIKE TARGET PRACTICE GAMES YOU’LL LOVE THIS LITTLE JEM !
 JUST LIKE THE MOVIE  “ I ROBOT“ WITH ACTOR WILL SMITH  . 
 IF YOU LOVED THAT MOVIE AS I DID THEN YOUR THERE DUDE ! GREAT PRICE PERFORMANCE TOO !

Shooting game not bad at all    At the moment seems to be only two scenarios with various differculty levels. Graphics not world class but at the price very good.  There is a trophy challenge and a very novel looking mods available to change your gameplay.  At the price quite a bargain. Give it a go worth the a look.
Only played it a few time . So far I ready like it
